title: Find My Device - Play button
scenario: Find My Device Play button shows hearing safety warning dialog before sending tone to headset
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap the Find My Device feature (e.g., via the device card or overflow menu).
Tap the Play button in the Find My Device screen.
Observe that a hearing safety warning dialog appears.
Tap the acknowledgment button (e.g., 'OK' or 'I Understand') on the warning dialog.
Verify that a tone is sent to the connected headset.
Verify that the headset lights flash (if the device supports this).
Observe that the app displays a 'Sending tone...' message.
Observe that an animated stop button is shown on screen.
expected: Tapping Play shows a hearing safety warning dialog. After acknowledging and tapping Play again, a tone plays on the headset, headset lights flash (if supported), 'Sending tone...' message appears, and an animated stop button is displayed.
